notes: OpenSpec change state lives under openspec/changes/<change>/; use this file only as a repo-level fallback index for non-OpenSpec work.
latest_evidence: Standardized storefront backend URL construction on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/lib/api.ts now owns backendUrl, backend asset normalization, font URL helpers, and customization image upload; apps/storefront/app/routes/categories.$categoryHandle.products.$productHandle.tsx no longer declares its own BACKEND_URL or hand-builds backend upload/font URLs. Uploaded customization asset preview URLs are normalized through the shared backend asset fallback. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but exits successfully. Added admin order item production readiness action on 2026-07-18: Order Item Production Status now includes not_required, pending_review, and ready. Backend exposes PATCH /api/admin/orders/:orderNumber/items/:itemId/production, and apps/admin/src/pages/order-detail.tsx Production sidebar shows Mark ready for pending_review items, refreshes order detail, and changes the aggregate badge to Ready once all reviewed items are ready. Verified with pnpm --filter backend test -- src/routes/admin/orders.test.ts, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, and pnpm --filter admin build. Aligned admin order cancellation payment state on 2026-07-18: backend/admin now allow paymentStatus cancelled, and apps/admin/src/pages/order-detail.tsx Cancel order sends paymentStatus cancelled only when the current payment is pending. Cancelled manual-payment orders no longer show Payment Pending or outstanding collectible amount; settled payment states paid/refunded/failed stay separate for future refund or settlement workflows. Removed leftover Default Sales Channel copy from order detail. Verified with pnpm --filter backend test -- src/routes/admin/orders.test.ts, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, and pnpm --filter admin build. Implemented real admin Order detail status actions on 2026-07-18: apps/backend/src/routes/admin/orders.ts now exposes PATCH /api/admin/orders/:orderNumber/status for existing domain-modeled order status, payment status, and fulfillment status updates, with route coverage in apps/backend/src/routes/admin/orders.test.ts. apps/admin/src/lib/orders-client.ts adds the status update client, and apps/admin/src/pages/order-detail.tsx enables cancel order, mark payment paid/failed/refunded, and fulfillment status actions with refreshed page state and toasts. Customer/address and edit-order mutations remain disabled because Order Address Snapshot and Order Item Snapshot are immutable in CONTEXT.md. Verified with pnpm --filter backend test -- src/routes/admin/orders.test.ts, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, pnpm --filter admin build, and browser action check marking ORD-MRHUY1AH-Z5E0 paid via superadmin/superadmin; no console errors or warnings. Backend build still prints the known Wrangler EPERM debug-log warning but exits successfully. Restored Medusa-style order detail action menus on 2026-07-18: apps/admin/src/pages/order-detail.tsx now shows action menus for order cancel, summary edit, payment status, fulfillment, and customer edits, but keeps mutation actions disabled with a backend-workflow note until real admin order mutation routes exist. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build. Refined admin Order detail against the Trophy order domain model on 2026-07-18: apps/admin/src/pages/order-detail.tsx now presents order items as immutable snapshots, fixes duplicate quantity multiplication on line totals, derives paid/outstanding totals from paymentStatus, removes fake Cancel/Edit/Fulfill/Capture action menus without backend contracts, uses manual-payment messaging for Manual Payment Orders, labels fulfillment from real fulfillmentStatus, adds a Production sidebar summary from item-level productionStatus, and adds an accessible FocusModal.Title to the customization preview modal. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build and browser check at http://127.0.0.1:5174/orders/ORD-MRHUY1AH-Z5E0 using superadmin/superadmin; order detail and preview modal had no console errors or warnings. Updated admin Orders list toward Medusa Admin behavior on 2026-07-18: apps/admin/src/pages/orders-list.tsx now supports CSV export of filtered rows, Add filter menu/chips for Region, Sales Channel, Created, Payment, and Fulfillment, status/date filtering, Clear all, sorting, a Sales Channel column, linked row cells, and Medusa Table.Pagination at 20 rows/page. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build plus browser verification at http://127.0.0.1:5174/orders using superadmin/superadmin; filter menu, Payment chip selection, and Export click produced no console errors or warnings. Medusa reference list/filter was inspected at http://localhost:9000/app/orders; Medusa detail/export routes were unavailable because its local dev server failed dynamic imports. Updated storefront cart recently-viewed mobile layout on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/components/cart/RecentlyViewedProducts.tsx now uses the shared Carousel pattern with 2 visible items on mobile, 4 visible items on desktop, and left/right actions when the row can scroll. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy. Added storefront best-sellers customization filtering on 2026-07-18: apps/backend/src/routes/storefront/collections.ts now accepts customizable=all|true|false on GET /api/storefront/collections/:handle/products, and best-sellers page 1 fills missing curated slots with matching published fallback products outside the collection. apps/storefront/app/lib/api.ts exposes the customizable query option, and apps/storefront/app/routes/home.tsx now calls best-sellers separately for customizable and regular best-selling sections instead of client-filtering one large response. Added route-level regression coverage in apps/backend/src/routes/storefront/collections.test.ts. Verified with pnpm --filter backend test, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck, and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but exits successfully. Removed uploaded-image rotate actions from @trophy/customization-react on 2026-07-18: packages/customization-react/src/index.tsx selected uploaded-image action dock now keeps zoom, move, and reset controls but no longer shows Rotate left / Rotate right buttons. Verified with ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/customization-react/tsconfig.json and pnpm --filter @trophy/customization-react check. Fixed desktop fullscreen preview layering in @trophy/customization-react on 2026-07-18: packages/customization-react/src/index.tsx now renders fullscreen mode through createPortal(..., document.body) with a top-level overlay z-index, preventing sticky desktop PDP/header layers from sitting above the fullscreen preview; packages/customization-react/package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml now declare react-dom and @types/react-dom for the new portal import. Verified with ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/customization-react/tsconfig.json, pnpm --filter @trophy/customization-react check after allowing pnpm network access for dependency policy verification, and pnpm --filter router-cf build; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning during storefront build but exits successfully. Updated storefront home merchandising on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/routes/home.tsx now fetches up to 24 best-seller items and splits them into customizable and non-customizable best-seller sections; apps/storefront/app/components/home/BestSellersSection.tsx supports section-specific headings/descriptions; apps/storefront/app/components/home/CategoriesSection.tsx now shows only the first 4 API-returned categories with no scroll controls and keeps a 2-column grid on small screens before switching to 4 columns on desktop; both product sections use the same featured ProductCard UI without customization badges. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but both commands exit successfully. Updated shared customization preview action icons on 2026-07-18: packages/customization-react/src/index.tsx now uses the Fullscreen icon for the fullscreen action and the distinct Crosshair focus icon for fit-to-view, replacing the duplicated Maximize2 icon while preserving existing toolbar behavior and accessibility labels. Verified with pnpm --filter @trophy/customization-react check. Updated storefront checkout mobile order summary on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/routes/checkout.tsx now uses the same exact #F5F5F5 gray background for the mobile order-summary strip as the desktop right-side summary column. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but both commands exit successfully. Updated storefront listing hero background on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/components/products/ProductListingShell.tsx now uses the public /category_bg.jpg asset as the ListingHero background with dark overlays for text contrast while preserving the existing featured product image panel. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but both commands exit successfully. Refactored storefront checkout route on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/routes/checkout.tsx now keeps route-level ownership for cart resolving, order submit, session-storage confirmation payload, and navigation, while the UI is split into focused internal components for header, empty state, error alert, mobile order summary, desktop order summary, customer information, payment method, additional requirements/VAT fields, and submit/policy actions. Shared summary row/totals/discount components remove the previous mobile-vs-desktop duplicate order-summary markup. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but both commands exit successfully. Refactored storefront product listing shell on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/components/products/ProductListingShell.tsx now splits the route-facing shell into focused internal sections for hero/breadcrumbs, trust bar, filter/result summary, empty state, product grid, pagination, and editorial content. The existing filters prop and FilterChips import are now connected again through the active filter/result summary section instead of dead commented JSX. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but both commands exit successfully. Updated storefront checkout layout on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/routes/checkout.tsx now uses the shared Container for header/empty/error wrappers while the main checkout form uses a Shopify-style 50/50 split layout; the left form content is constrained and aligned to the divider, and the desktop order-summary/right column itself uses exact #F5F5F5 as a full-height region outside any Container, with only the sticky summary content constrained inside. Checkout structural lines use #DEDEDE. Existing shared controls remain in use for Input, Label, Button, Checkbox, RadioGroup, and Textarea; the repo has no shared Separator component. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but both commands exit successfully. Updated storefront category navigation routing on 2026-07-17. Categories now use `/categories/:categoryHandle` and `/categories/:categoryHandle/products/:productHandle`; desktop navbar strip and mobile category menu underline the active category from the current pathname; category cards, occasion links, search category results, and listing product cards now point to the new path structure; PDP breadcrumbs link back to the active category; and the legacy `/product/:handle` route now redirects to the product's primary category PDP so older product links still resolve. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build. Earlier on 2026-07-17, updated storefront cart quantity commit behavior in apps/storefront/app/components/ui/quantity-input.tsx and apps/storefront/app/routes/cart.tsx. QuantityInput now supports a commitOnBlur mode, and cart uses it so typed values stay local until blur while +/- still update immediately, preventing temporary large or negative inputs from immediately changing totals or deleting a line item. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build. Earlier on 2026-07-17, updated storefront listing pagination visibility in apps/storefront/app/components/products/ProductListingShell.tsx so the shared listing shell only renders Pagination when totalPages > 1, preventing single-page product or collection listings from showing inert pagination controls. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build.

features.name: Monorepo Baseline Setup
features.description: Confirm the workspace installs, builds, and type-checks from the repo root using the documented verification path.
features.evidence: Verified from repo root on 2026-06-21 with ./init.sh. Workspace install, backend build, admin build, storefront typecheck, and storefront build all completed successfully.

features.name: Backend API Foundation
features.description: Establish the Hono API structure in apps/backend, including route organization and Cloudflare Worker bindings needed for ecommerce features.
features.evidence: Implemented backend route structure for ecommerce catalog work in apps/backend, including /api/products and /api/product-metadata, and verified with pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, and ./init.sh on 2026-06-21.

features.name: Data Layer With Drizzle And D1
features.description: Introduce Drizzle schema, migrations, and Cloudflare D1 bindings only after the backend structure is in place.
features.evidence: Added product catalog Drizzle tables, generated apps/backend/drizzle/0001_modern_boom_boom.sql, applied the migration locally with pnpm --filter backend db:migrate:local, and verified the repo with ./init.sh on 2026-06-21.

features.name: Admin App Router Migration
features.description: Move the admin app from starter content toward a React Router-based internal application shell and first operational screens.
features.evidence: Added admin order item production readiness action on 2026-07-18: Order Item Production Status now includes not_required, pending_review, and ready. Backend exposes PATCH /api/admin/orders/:orderNumber/items/:itemId/production, and apps/admin/src/pages/order-detail.tsx Production sidebar shows Mark ready for pending_review items, refreshes order detail, and changes the aggregate badge to Ready once all reviewed items are ready. Verified with pnpm --filter backend test -- src/routes/admin/orders.test.ts, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, and pnpm --filter admin build. Aligned admin order cancellation payment state on 2026-07-18: backend/admin now allow paymentStatus cancelled, and apps/admin/src/pages/order-detail.tsx Cancel order sends paymentStatus cancelled only when the current payment is pending. Cancelled manual-payment orders no longer show Payment Pending or outstanding collectible amount; settled payment states paid/refunded/failed stay separate for future refund or settlement workflows. Removed leftover Default Sales Channel copy from order detail. Verified with pnpm --filter backend test -- src/routes/admin/orders.test.ts, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, and pnpm --filter admin build. Cleaned up admin Orders list domain fields on 2026-07-18: apps/admin/src/pages/orders-list.tsx now removes fake Region and Sales Channel fields because Trophy does not model them on orders. The list, filters, search, and CSV export use Order, Date, Customer, Status, Payment, Fulfillment, Order Total, and Currency; Add filter offers Status, Created, Payment, and Fulfillment. Payment remains because paymentStatus is part of the order model. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build. Expanded the admin SPA through 2026-06-25 with routes for orders, products, collections, categories, inventory, customers, promotions, price-lists, team, and settings. Added Better Auth login, backend CORS, Medusa-thin create product with variant media, and product detail page. Fixed variant media gallery on both create and product-detail pages on 2026-06-25: root cause was Radix UI FocusModal setting pointer-events:none on body — added pointer-events-auto to gallery overlay, backdrop click to close gallery, capture-phase Escape handler to close gallery (not FocusModal) on first press, and guarded FocusModal onOpenChange with variantGallery check. Product detail page had zero variant media support — added upload, thumbnail grid, gallery lightbox with Prev/Next navigation and filmstrip, and delete. Verified via browser testing, backdrop click test, Escape-two-press flow test, and pnpm --filter admin build. Flattened the shell to use `@medusajs/ui` primitives and moved the route into a `FocusModal` overlay above the products list to better match Medusa's modal workflow. Rebuilt the protected admin shell into a Medusa-style dark navigation rail with grouped primary navigation, nested `Products -> Collections/Categories`, bottom-pinned settings/account actions, and placeholder screens for unfinished commerce sections, and documented the sidebar design in `docs/plans/2026-06-23-admin-sidebar-medusa-design.md`. Verified with pnpm --filter backend build, pnpm --filter admin build, pnpm --filter backend db:migrate:local, direct local worker requests for bootstrap/sign-in/get-session/change-password/create-user/ban-user/set-user-password/revoke-user-sessions, direct OPTIONS preflight checks for /api/admin/auth/sign-in/username, node --check apps/backend/scripts/seed-admin.mjs, and ./init.sh on 2026-06-22, plus pnpm --filter admin build and ./init.sh again on 2026-06-23 and 2026-06-24 after the Medusa create-product UX implementation, thin-scope alignment, variant-media upload pass, shell refactor, `FocusModal` overlay refactor, and Medusa-style sidebar pass. Refactored sidebar into reusable medusa-style components (SidebarRoot, SidebarBrand, SidebarSearch, SidebarNav, SidebarNavItemRow, SidebarSection, SidebarSpacer, SidebarUserRow) in src/components/ui/medusa/sidebar.tsx with sidebar config extracted to src/lib/sidebar-config.ts. Sidebar now only shows real project features (Orders, Products, Customization, Team, Settings) instead of Medusa's full commerce sidebar. Refactored orders-list and order-detail pages (2026-06-25) to use @medusajs/ui components (Container, Heading, Text, Input, Table, Button, Badge) with lucide-react icons instead of custom HTML/CSS. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build and ./init.sh. Also refactored products-list and product-detail pages (2026-06-25) to use @medusajs/ui components (Container, Heading, Text, Input, Table, Button, Badge) with lucide-react icons. Product detail now uses Container for section cards, Button with icons for actions, Badge for statuses, and inline Text for summary rows instead of custom PageHeader/SectionCard/SummaryRow/StatusBadge. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build and ./init.sh. Also refactored placeholder-index page (collections/categories) to use @medusajs/ui components with lucide-react icons. Also refactored security (settings) and team pages (2026-06-25) to use @medusajs/ui Container/Heading/Text/Button/Badge components with lucide-react icons, replacing custom PageHeader/SectionCard/SummaryRow/EmptyState and raw button elements. Implemented Admin UI for Collections and Categories management on 2026-07-04, replacing the placeholder pages with real Medusa UI CRUD pages and adding missing PUT and DELETE routes to the backend product-metadata API, verified via ./init.sh. Fixed admin product detail publish status display on 2026-07-04 by normalizing backend lowercase product statuses in the admin product mapper; added regression coverage for lowercase `published` and verified with pnpm --filter admin test -- products-client.test.ts, pnpm --filter admin build, and ./init.sh. Fixed admin sign-in/session loading on 2026-07-05 by replacing Better Auth cookie-only get-session usage in the admin app with backend GET /api/admin/me backed by a shared admin session resolver that accepts the sign-in Bearer token; added bearer-only route regression coverage and verified with pnpm --filter backend test -- auth-session.test.ts, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend test, pnpm --filter backend build, pnpm --filter admin build, and ./init.sh. Grilled Medusa-style default option/value behavior on 2026-07-06 and captured domain decisions in CONTEXT.md: default option/value are real visible option data, option/value labels can be renamed, used option values can be deleted leaving admin Missing value state, publish is blocked while variants are unreconciled, and storefront disables invalid combinations with auto-reselection, and replaced the drawer-based multi-option management with a single-option FocusModal styled with Medusa UI components on 2026-07-11. Clicking the dropdown menu next to an option triggers the 'Edit Option' modal (prefilled with Option title and a tag-input for Variations/Values). Admins can also delete options via the dropdown or add a new option from the top card dropdown. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build and ./init.sh. Fixed admin product-detail create-option payload shape on 2026-07-12 after localized option contracts changed the backend validator to require `values: [{ value: { vi, en } }]` on POST `/api/admin/products/:id/options`; updated the admin product-detail options modal and client helper to send the nested `value` object and added a regression in `apps/admin/src/lib/products-client.test.ts`. Verified with pnpm --filter admin test -- products-client.test.ts and pnpm --filter admin build. Standardized admin product save-error feedback on 2026-07-12. Create product submit validation/save failures and product detail save/update failures now call toast.error(...) with the same message shown inline. Covered overview, organize, attributes, customization, publish/archive, media thumbnail save, variant price/stock/create/edit/delete, and option-save validation. Verified with pnpm --filter admin build. Added variant-specific attribute overrides on 2026-07-12. Backend now stores per-variant attributes in `product_variant_attributes` with localized translations, admin product-detail variant create/edit can keep shared product attributes or persist variant-only overrides, and publish validation now checks translated variant override rows. Verified with focused backend route tests, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, pnpm --filter admin build, and ./init.sh.

features.name: Storefront Commerce Experience
features.description: Build shopper-facing routes and data flows in the React Router storefront, integrating with the backend API once contracts exist.
features.evidence: Redesigned the Storefront Navbar on 2026-07-03 to include a two-row structure with an expanded search bar, a '+ MORE' dropdown (News, Contact, About), and a styled Cart button, matching the new mockups. Reorganized all routes to share a common layout with this Navbar. Planned storefront public product APIs on 2026-07-03 via `CONTEXT.md`, `docs/adr/0002-storefront-product-api-boundary.md`, and local ready-for-agent PRD `.scratch/issues/storefront-product-apis-prd.md`; the PRD defines published-only public listing/detail APIs, search as a listing query, Contact Price behavior, and a separate admin catalog API boundary. Proposed OpenSpec change `storefront-product-apis` with proposal, design, specs, tasks, progress, and session handoff under `openspec/changes/storefront-product-apis/`. Implemented storefront product APIs on 2026-07-03: backend `/api/storefront/products` (listing with search/category filter/pagination/price/thumbnail) and `/api/storefront/products/:handle` (detail with full relations), public CORS, 12 route-level tests, storefront API client, stable category handles, Contact Price rendering. Verified with pnpm --filter backend check/build/test, pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck/build, openspec validate --strict, and ./init.sh. Investigated storefront SSR instability on 2026-07-04: `/products` 500 reproduced under preview when backend fallback used `127.0.0.1:8787`; local backend responded at `localhost:8787` but not `127.0.0.1:8787`. Updated storefront backend fallback URLs to `localhost:8787` and verified `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, preview build, curl `/products` 200, Playwright reload checks with no console errors or hydration warnings, and `./init.sh`. Captured the TrophySmack-inspired storefront home UI spec on 2026-07-05 in `docs/plans/2026-07-05-storefront-home-trophysmack-layout-spec.md`; the spec defines the Premium Championship Commerce section order, responsive behavior, component plan, data requirements, accessibility rules, and acceptance criteria. No implementation files were changed in that spec pass. Implemented the storefront product detail redesign on 2026-07-10: the route now uses a personalization-first Customily-inspired layout with sticky live preview stage, separated purchase/customization panel, shopper-style customization field cards, larger clipart/upload controls, and full-width product detail/trust sections below. Backend contracts, Contact Price behavior, selected-variant customization background, validation, upload endpoint, and cart snapshot behavior were unchanged. Follow-up refinement on 2026-07-10 changed variant selection to product-option groups with single-value options hidden, kept customization form focused on personalization fields, and added uploaded-image preview editing with drag-to-pan plus zoom, rotate, directional nudge, reset, and remove controls. Added optional `cropRotationDeg` to shared customization image values/runtime. Latest follow-up moved image adjustment actions into the preview canvas as a floating toolbar for the selected uploaded image, leaving the form focused on upload/replace/remove. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter customization test`, `pnpm --filter customization check`, and `pnpm --filter router-cf build`. Latest 2026-07-10 follow-up rebuilt product detail as a unified personalization studio: the preview now has Edit/View mode switching, fit/zoom controls, View-mode pan/pinch zoom, and admin-like uploaded-image editing in Edit mode with click-to-select, drag-to-move crop, wheel zoom, floating zoom/rotate/nudge/reset controls, and four corner handles for image scaling. Gallery, setup panel, variant option buttons, and customization section were restyled into one studio/workflow system. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter customization test`, `pnpm --filter customization check`, and `pnpm --filter router-cf build`. Follow-up moved selected uploaded-image actions into the preview top toolbar, rendering only in Edit mode after image selection while leaving only the selected-image outline and four scale handles on the canvas. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck` and `pnpm --filter router-cf build`. Extracted the customization React UI into `@trophy/customization-react` on 2026-07-10. The shared package owns the shadcn-style preview canvas/form UI, Edit/View modes, selected-image top toolbar, four-corner handles, upload field, clipart selector, text fields, and asset/font URL resolver hooks. Storefront product detail and admin PreviewDialog now both consume the shared package, with app-specific code limited to upload/font/asset callbacks and admin-only reset/export/close shell controls. Deleted the old storefront-local customization component and removed admin-local preview/form implementation. Verified with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization-react check`, `pnpm --filter @trophy/admin build`, `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and `pnpm --filter customization check`. Updated shared customization form UI on 2026-07-11 to match the provided mug customization references while leaving the preview canvas/editor unchanged. The shared package `@trophy/customization-react` now owns the form presentation used by both storefront product detail and admin PreviewDialog: large plain labels, responsive 56px-style inputs, square color/font swatches, upload thumbnail + Replace/remove controls, and admin-safe responsive sizing. Existing data contracts, upload handling, crop/edit behavior, validation, and cart snapshot logic were preserved. Verified with pnpm --filter @trophy/customization-react check, pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck, pnpm --filter router-cf build, and pnpm --filter admin build. Fixed storefront Tailwind generation for @trophy/customization-react on 2026-07-11: admin already scanned the shared package through Tailwind v3 content, while storefront uses Tailwind v4 and now declares @source "../../../packages/customization-react/src" in apps/storefront/app/app.css. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build. Updated shared customization preview toolbar layout on 2026-07-11 to prevent image-selection layout shift: the header stays stable with mode and viewport zoom controls, and a fixed 76px sticky action rail directly below it shows either guidance or the selected image crop/rotate/nudge/reset actions. Verified with pnpm --filter @trophy/customization-react check, pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck, pnpm --filter router-cf build, and pnpm --filter admin build. On 2026-07-16, replaced that shared preview chrome with a minimal, selection-driven overlay model in `packages/customization-react/src/index.tsx`: removed the visible View/Edit switch, removed the fixed top action rail, moved zoom/fit controls to a bottom-right floating dock, moved uploaded-image actions to a bottom-left floating dock that only appears while an uploaded image is selected, restored click-empty-canvas pan mode, and kept read-only preview limited to zoom/pan only. Verified with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization-react check`, `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and `pnpm --filter admin build`. Unified storefront product detail visual design on 2026-07-11: breadcrumbs, gallery shell, customization purchase panel, option/quantity controls, mobile action bar, and lower detail/trust sections now share a white workbench background, max-width 1680px frame, 14px shell radius, warm tan borders (#d8c1ad), deep ink CTA (#110023), blue-gray labels (#2d4056), and muted copy (#7b6b5f). Product data flow, customization runtime, upload handling, validation, and cart behavior were unchanged. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck, pnpm --filter router-cf build, and pnpm --filter admin build. On 2026-07-11, refined the storefront product detail into a true white-luxury direction: updated `apps/storefront/DESIGN_2.md` to replace the warm off-white system with true-white surfaces, mineral borders, ink CTAs, cooler supporting text, and a 1680px workbench layout; synced `app/app.css`, `tailwind.config.js`, and the product detail components so breadcrumbs, gallery shell, option buttons, quantity stepper, purchase panel, trust cards, and mobile action bar all use the new palette and softer elevation. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-07-11 redesigned the Product Detail page to exactly match the TrophySmack visual reference: added a horizontal gallery thumbnail strip with prev/next controls, flattened the customization side panel, implemented a "STEP X:" pattern in `@trophy/customization-react` with dense 6-col clipart grids and compact 32px color swatches, styled the quantity stepper and Add to Cart/Preview CTAs, and extracted short product descriptions into the header block. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`. On 2026-07-11, simplified the storefront palette further by removing the champagne-metal accent from the canonical design spec and remapping storefront tokens to a stricter white/ink/graphite/mineral system. Updated `apps/storefront/DESIGN.md`, `app/app.css`, and `tailwind.config.js` so token aliases like `primary-container`, `secondary`, `inverse-primary`, and `primary-fixed` no longer point to metallic beige values. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and `pnpm --filter admin build`. On 2026-07-11, aligned the storefront design system to the local TrophySmack reference at `/Users/dnt/Desktop/www.trophysmack.com/www.trophysmack.com/index.html`: switched storefront font loading to `Koulen` + `Open Sans`, remapped core storefront tokens to TrophySmack colors (`#171740`, `#244159`, `#288AB6`, `#04A387`, `#EA4222`, `#232323`, `#FFFFFF`), updated `apps/storefront/DESIGN.md`, and tuned the product detail CTA/price/option typography to match that retail system. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and `pnpm --filter admin build`. On 2026-07-11, extended the TrophySmack alignment beyond product detail into the broader storefront shell: updated cart and checkout routes to use the TrophySmack font hierarchy (`Koulen` display, `Open Sans` body), teal pricing, orange checkout/order CTAs, and dark-blue headings while keeping the existing storefront behavior and data flow intact. Also cleaned remaining storefront display-font references such as the home hero comment. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and `pnpm --filter admin build`. On 2026-07-11, continued the storefront-wide TrophySmack redesign across the shopper shell and home/shared UI: updated `Navbar`, `Footer`, `HeroSection`, `TrustBar`, `BestSellersSection`, `CategoriesSection`, `CustomizationFeatureSection`, `NewsletterSection`, `ProofRow`, `ReviewsSection`, `ShopByOccasionSection`, `ProductCard`, `Pagination`, and `FilterChips` to use the TrophySmack blue/orange/teal hierarchy and Koulen display treatment. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and `pnpm --filter admin build`. Final screenshot-driven alignment on 2026-07-11 then corrected the remaining role mismatches: supportive CTAs now use blue in the home hero, newsletter, cart empty state, and cart checkout; checkout payment submission and selected payment states now use teal; collection/product-card and recently-viewed prices now use orange; and cart/checkout summary values now stay neutral/dark instead of overusing teal. `apps/storefront/DESIGN.md` was updated to document this component-level mapping, and verification again passed with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck` and `pnpm --filter router-cf build`. Follow-up cleanup on 2026-07-11 replaced the recent direct TrophySmack hex usage with semantic Tailwind tokens in `apps/storefront/app/app.css` and `apps/storefront/tailwind.config.js`, then refactored the touched storefront shell/home/shared/product/cart/checkout components to use semantic utilities like `brand-*`, `action-*`, `text-*`, `surface-*`, and `border-*` instead of hardcoded colors. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and targeted `rg` checks against the touched storefront surface set. Latest follow-up on 2026-07-11 redesigned the storefront product listing surfaces (`/products` and `/collections/:handle`) around the supplied TrophySmack collection screenshot: added a shared `ProductListingShell` with dark hero, trust badges, structured filter toolbar, denser product-card grid, and numbered pagination; updated product/collection routes to use the shared shell; and normalized storefront listing category URLs to use category handles directly in `?category=`. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and local preview at `http://localhost:4173/`. Follow-up on 2026-07-17 updated `apps/storefront/app/components/products/ProductListingShell.tsx` so `Pagination` renders only when `totalPages > 1`, removing single-page pagination chrome from the shared product and collection listing shell. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck` and `pnpm --filter router-cf build`. A final storefront tokenization pass then removed remaining active-surface hardcodes from PDP shell, mobile/mega navigation, checkout neutrals, newsletter/category overlays, and rating color. After that pass, direct hex values under `apps/storefront/app` remained only in `app/app.css` token definitions and the unreferenced legacy component `app/components/CupCustomizer.tsx`. Verification: `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and targeted `rg` scans pass. Final shared-token follow-up on 2026-07-11 aligned `packages/customization-react/src/index.tsx` to the storefront semantic token contract and added the same generic token vocabulary (`accent`, `accent-foreground`, `surface-container-low`, `surface-container`, `surface-container-lowest`, `outline`, `outline-variant`, `on-surface`, `on-surface-variant`, `destructive`) to `apps/admin/tailwind.config.ts`, so the shared customization UI renders consistently in both storefront and admin. Verified with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization-react check`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, and `pnpm --filter router-cf build`. Final cleanup then deleted the unused legacy storefront component `apps/storefront/app/components/CupCustomizer.tsx` on 2026-07-11 after confirming it had no remaining references. Verified with `rg -n "CupCustomizer" apps/storefront apps/admin packages` returning no matches and `pnpm --filter router-cf build` passing. Updated storefront home bestseller section on 2026-07-14 to match the local TrophySmack featured-collection reference more closely: BestSellersSection now uses a white 1200px frame, desktop 88px top spacing, centered uppercase heading, and 4-up desktop / 2-up mobile carousel sizing; ProductCard now has a featured variant with square product image slots, desktop image sizes target of 267px, centered title/rating/price. Existing listing cards remain on the default variant. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build. Updated storefront home newsletter section on 2026-07-14 from the pasted TrophySmack snippet: narrow centered block, uppercase heading, compact subheading, 58px email field, and flush right mail-icon submit button using semantic storefront tokens. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build. Updated storefront mobile navigation on 2026-07-16 to replace the old fixed full-screen overlay with a drawer backed by Radix Dialog. The new drawer renders through a portal, uses a dedicated `100dvh` scroll container with `overflow-y-auto overscroll-contain`, and removes the manual `body.style.overflow = 'hidden'` lock that conflicted with the sticky navbar after scrolling. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build. Implemented storefront recently viewed products in cart on 2026-07-16: PDP now records a minimal recent-view snapshot in `localStorage` through `apps/storefront/app/lib/recently-viewed.ts`, cart reads that history after mount, filters out products already in cart, and renders up to four real recently viewed items through `apps/storefront/app/components/cart/RecentlyViewedProducts.tsx`. Added helper unit coverage in `apps/storefront/app/lib/recently-viewed.test.ts`, widened storefront `vitest` include so the new test runs, and restored full harness verification by rendering the existing `variantError` inline in `apps/admin/src/pages/product-detail/product-detail-variants.tsx`. Verified with `pnpm --filter router-cf test`, `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, and `./init.sh`. Updated storefront checkout layout on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/routes/checkout.tsx now uses the shared Container for header/empty/error wrappers while the main checkout form uses a Shopify-style 50/50 split layout; the left form content is constrained and aligned to the divider, and the desktop order-summary/right column itself uses exact #F5F5F5 as a full-height region outside any Container, with only the sticky summary content constrained inside. Checkout structural lines use #DEDEDE. Existing shared controls remain in use for Input, Label, Button, Checkbox, RadioGroup, and Textarea; the repo has no shared Separator component. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but both commands exit successfully. Updated storefront home merchandising on 2026-07-18: home now splits best-selling products into customizable and non-customizable sections using the same product-card UI, limits categories to the first 4 API-returned categories, removes category scroll controls, and keeps the category grid at 2 columns on small screens and 4 columns on desktop. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but both commands exit successfully. Added storefront best-sellers customization filtering on 2026-07-18: collection products API now supports customizable=all|true|false, best-sellers page 1 fills missing curated slots with matching published fallback products, and home uses separate backend calls for customizable and regular best-selling sections. Verified with backend test/check/build and storefront typecheck/build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but exits successfully. Updated storefront cart recently-viewed mobile layout on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/components/cart/RecentlyViewedProducts.tsx now uses the shared Carousel pattern with 2 visible items on mobile, 4 visible items on desktop, and left/right actions when the row can scroll. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy. Standardized storefront backend URL construction on 2026-07-18: apps/storefront/app/lib/api.ts now owns backendUrl, backend asset normalization, font URL helpers, and customization image upload; apps/storefront/app/routes/categories.$categoryHandle.products.$productHandle.tsx no longer declares its own BACKEND_URL or hand-builds backend upload/font URLs. Uploaded customization asset preview URLs are normalized through the shared backend asset fallback. Verified with pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck and pnpm --filter router-cf build via rtk proxy; Wrangler still prints the known EPERM debug-log warning but exits successfully.

features.name: Cup Customization And Production Artwork
features.description: Allow admins to define fixed customization blocks on cup previews, shoppers to fill those blocks through a form, and the backend to validate and export SVG/PDF production artwork.
features.evidence: Replaced shared custom-shapes-library with per-template vector drawing tool on 2026-06-27. Added VectorPointType/VectorPoint/VectorPath types and "vector" ShapeType; removed CustomShape/"custom_svg"/customization_shapes table/shapes API/ShapeLibraryDialog/useShapeLibrary. Implemented draw mode with click-to-add-corner and click-drag-for-smooth Bézier points, floating VectorDrawOverlay (Undo/Close/Cancel), live draw preview SVG. Edit mode: VectorPointOverlay with point-drag, Bézier handle drag, double-click corner↔smooth toggle, keyboard delete (selected point only). Inspector: VectorPointsTable for manual numeric editing. Updated cssShapeClip/shapeClipSvg for "vector" in admin, storefront, and backend. All 15 customization package tests pass; pnpm --filter admin build, pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck all pass. Removed old design doc at docs/plans/2026-06-27-custom-shapes-library-design.md. Refactored the customization runtime and UI from the earlier zone+block draft to a clean block-only model on 2026-06-25. Shared contracts now expose template-level typed blocks, blockId-based layers, normalized preview-image-relative bounds, and block-based SVG/PDF export helpers. The admin block editor was then simplified to a dynamic per-type form: technical export fields were removed from the primary panel, text blocks now support fixed or shopper-selectable color/font-family options, block hide/unhide plus dependency-aware delete were added, and the editor now supports same-page Edit/Preview mode with isolated sandbox values that reuse the shopper-form rendering rules for draft testing. Preview text rendering now keeps text_single on one canvas line and preserves text_multi newline breaks. Icon and image renderable blocks now keep visibleWhen behavior while supporting both admin-provided preset choices and uploaded media values from the same block control/value slot. Admin placement editing now presents block geometry as move/resize only, with rotation disabled and resize persisted as width/height bounds rather than scale. Uploaded media now renders cover-fit and clipped to fixed block bounds, with crop zoom/pan metadata editable by dragging in storefront/admin Preview mode plus zoom controls, without changing admin-defined block geometry. Storefront rendering now honors hidden blocks and published text-style choices. Verification passes with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, `pnpm --filter backend build`, and `openspec validate cup-customization-production --strict`; the latest uploaded-media cover crop work was rechecked with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, and `openspec validate cup-customization-production --strict`. Fixed two issues on 2026-06-25 blocking the admin customization page: (1) `customization_template_revisions` table was missing `blocks_json` column causing 500 error on `GET /api/customizations/templates` — added via ALTER TABLE; (2) `ProductSelector` sent `limit=200` to backend which only accepts up to `limit=100` — changed admin to use `limit=100`; (3) added PRODUCTS_CORS_POLICY middleware for `/api/products` so admin cross-origin fetch works. On 2026-06-26, approved and committed `docs/plans/2026-06-26-customization-editor-ui-model-design.md`, created and implemented OpenSpec change `customization-editor-ui-model`, and replaced the block-only runtime with the editor model (`background`, `layers`, `formFields`) across shared contracts, backend routes, admin editor, storefront runtime, and preview exports. Verified with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization check`, `pnpm --filter backend check`, `pnpm --filter backend build`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, `openspec validate customization-editor-ui-model --strict`, and `./init.sh`. On 2026-06-27, created and implemented OpenSpec change `customization-editor-canvas-viewport` to add admin canvas Edit/View modes, direct zoom percentage entry, Figma-like pan in View mode, and fit-to-view focus; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`, `openspec validate customization-editor-canvas-viewport --strict`, and `./init.sh`. Also fixed admin Text layer dragging so canvas sample text is preview-only/non-selectable and editing remains inspector-only, fixed Text layer movement drift by using pointer-down geometry snapshots, and fixed Text drag center-Y conversion so the clicked text stays under the pointer while still omitting persisted text height. Admin Preview Image Shape uploads now support direct drag-to-pan inside clipped shapes, wheel/trackpad uniform zoom, reset crop, and shared cover-crop math; explicit Zoom, Pan X, and Pan Y controls were removed; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build` and `./init.sh`. Text Path now renders in admin editor and admin Preview using shared SVG path generation for preset and custom Bezier paths; verified with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization check`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, and `./init.sh`. Implemented OpenSpec change `customization-text-on-closed-path` for Figma-like Text on path using closed ellipse/circle paths from the Blocks panel; scope excludes open arcs and Pen mode, all 22 tasks are complete, and verification passes with `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization test`, `pnpm --filter @trophy/customization check`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, `pnpm --filter backend check`, `pnpm --filter backend build`, `openspec validate customization-text-on-closed-path --strict`, and `./init.sh`. Remaining work includes backend asset hardening, draft/freeze workflow completion, export-profile/jobs, production font handling, and environment-specific deployment wiring. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 tightened admin Preview upload crop interaction so wheel/trackpad zoom scales around the pointer and rendering uses the current uploaded image URL/dimensions instead of layer data; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 updated admin Preview Image Shape crop interaction to support unconstrained movement, scale below cover-fit, four corner resize handles, and shape-only clipping when the image exceeds the shape; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 made admin Preview background and text layers non-selectable/non-interactive so uploaded image blocks remain clickable during crop editing; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 added admin Preview Edit/View modes: image handles only show after selecting an uploaded image in Edit mode, while View mode pans the canvas; mobile uses larger selected handles and the same mode switch; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 added Preview viewport zoom controls (`-`, percentage input, `+`, `Fit`) matching the admin editor pattern; zoom/pan is viewport-only and does not change crop values; verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`. Follow-up on 2026-06-27 added Atlassian Pragmatic Drag and Drop sorting for admin customization Layers and Form panels with drag handles, closest-edge insertion indicators, and visible destination position labels; verified with `pnpm --filter customization test`, `pnpm --filter admin build`, and `./init.sh`. Implemented OpenSpec change `pdf-background-vector-export` to allow uploading PDF files as backgrounds in admin and export a true vector PDF. Uploading uses `pdfjs-dist` to generate a PNG preview on the client side, while the full PDF is uploaded on publish to R2. The export route (`renderPdf`) embeds the PDF as a Form XObject using `pdf-lib`, loads font TTF from Worker static assets for direct text rendering, and supports character-by-character text on path generation. Verified with `./init.sh`. Added UI fixes based on user feedback on 2026-06-28: enhanced `TextEditorLayer` with `alignPolicy` and `formatPolicy` (bold, italic, underline) support for templates; added admin controls and shopper toolbars for formatting policies; implemented manual underline drawing via `pdf-lib` for text paths in `pdf-text-straight.ts`; fixed `FormPanel` `onFocus` handlers correctly selecting layers; separated Text Block and Text on Path completely by explicitly removing the legacy type switcher in `customization-template-inspector.tsx`; and revamped color policy UI to enforce an explicit 'Add Color' button interaction. Implemented dynamic brand assets configuration and dynamic fonts injection on 2026-06-28. Added `brand_colors` and `font_families` tables to D1, created backend REST API endpoints (`/api/brand-assets`) to manage and serve custom font TTF files from R2. Updated `CustomizationTemplateInspector` to fetch options dynamically via `useBrandAssets`. Passed dynamic fonts down to `fitTextToLayer` and PDF generators. Updated `Storefront` loader to fetch `dynamicFonts` and map them to `PreviewCanvas` and `FontLoader` to accurately display the user-uploaded fonts on storefront. Refactored the 'Add Font Family' UI in `brand-assets.tsx` to support uploading 4 variants of TTF files directly via a single-step form. Verified with `./init.sh`. On 2026-07-03, product-owned customization was specified via `CONTEXT.md`, `docs/adr/0001-product-owned-customization.md`, and local ready-for-agent PRD `.scratch/issues/product-owned-customization-prd.md`; the PRD replaces standalone template/revision lifecycle with one-to-one product customization in create product. On 2026-07-10, updated admin customization Preview field layout only: text/image controls now render as shopper-style field cards with styled upload picker, compact crop controls, larger clipart grid, and grouped text style controls; preview canvas/modal/export behavior was unchanged. Verified with `pnpm --filter admin build`.

features.name: Backend API Test Harness Definition
features.description: Make backend API contract and service/helper test coverage part of the repository's agent definition of done.
features.evidence: Updated AGENTS.md on 2026-07-04 so backend API work requires public route-surface API contract tests, important failure-mode coverage, service/helper unit tests for non-trivial business rules, and recorded risk when tests are intentionally omitted. Updated init.sh to run backend check, backend test, and backend build before admin/storefront verification. Verified with pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend test, pnpm --filter backend build, and ./init.sh. Added a Hono RPC harness rule on 2026-07-04: new backend route contracts consumed by admin/storefront should export backend route/app types, use typed hc<AppType>() clients, avoid new hand-written fetch wrappers unless a blocker is documented, and return explicit c.json(payload, status) responses for typed success/error cases.

features.name: Storefront GitHub CI/CD
features.description: Add GitHub Actions verification plus Cloudflare preview and production deploys for the storefront Worker.
features.evidence: Added `.github/workflows/storefront-ci-cd.yml` on 2026-07-10. Pull requests touching storefront/customization now run pnpm install, `pnpm --filter customization test`, `pnpm --filter customization check`, `pnpm --filter router-cf typecheck`, `pnpm --filter router-cf build`, then upload a Cloudflare Workers preview with `wrangler versions upload --preview-alias pr-<number>` and comment the preview URL back on the PR. Pushes to `main` for the same paths rerun checks and deploy production with Wrangler. Set `preview_urls: true` in `apps/storefront/wrangler.jsonc`. Verified locally with `ruby -e "require 'yaml'; YAML.load_file('.github/workflows/storefront-ci-cd.yml')"` and `./init.sh`.
